message:
fix: migrate doctor checks to label-based bead verification (gt-x9bdy)

AgentBeadsCheck now verifies agent beads have gt:agent label (not just
exist by ID), and Fix adds missing labels. StaleAgentBeadsCheck filters
by gt:agent label instead of listing all beads and filtering by prefix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
